suppress.notes: IZ Gateway manages the dependencies of bouncy castle
IZ Gateway only uses RSA certificates
IZ Gateway does not use any JSSE APIs for use other than with bc-fips which is a FIPS certified provider
CVE-2018-1258 requires Spring Framework 5.0.5, project is on 6.2.9 as of now - false positive (IGDD-2171)
CVE-2018-1258 requires Spring Framework 5.0.5, project is on 6.2.9 as of now - false positive (IGDD-2171)
CVE-2018-1258 requires Spring Framework 5.0.5, project is on 6.2.9 as of now - false positive (IGDD-2171)
CVE-2025-5222 false positive - affects ICU C++ not ICU4J Java

protobuf-java-4.34.1.jar: CVE-2026-0994 is a false positive. The vulnerability is in the Python protobuf library's json_format.ParseDict() function — specifically a recursion-depth counter bug in Python's json_format.py. That code does not exist in the Java implementation. The NVD CPE cpe:/a:google:protobuf is language-agnostic and incorrectly matches the Java artifact. The fix versions cited (5.29.6, 6.33.5) are Python package versions; there is no corresponding Java fix because there is no vulnerability in the Java library. Added: 2026-04-23
